svg.title: BlockDAG Operator Toolkit – Pre-Forge Collection
svg.desc: White and navy architecture diagram for the BlockDAG Pre-Forge operator toolkit collection.
svg.text: BASH · LINUX · DOCKER · 28 TOOLS · 7 CATEGORIES · 1 COMMUNITY · INSTALLATION & SELF-HEALING · NODE SETUP · COMMUNITY DEPLOYMENT
INSTALLATION & SELF-HEALING · NODE MONITORING · LIVE DIAGNOSTICS
- Detects broken GitHub download URL at runtime
- Asks for new URL, validates required files exist
- Rewrites its own GITHUB_URL variable in-place via sed
- Auto-detects existing node ports, increments per node
- Generates numbered management scripts per node
- Cross-reference updater patches all inter-script calls
- Downloads pristine GitHub files to reference folder first
- Builds each node directory from that clean reference
- Docker Compose isolation per node with project name
- Port collision detection across existing nodes
- Auto-generates node commands file on completion
- Surgical hotfix for v6 stop command bug
- Node 1 stop was stopping ALL nodes – not just Node 1
- Detects stop1.sh, applies targeted sed replacement
- Nodes 2+ already correct – touches Node 1 only
- Synced operator uploads 4 node folders to shared drive
- Falling-behind operator downloads and runs this
- Safely places files exactly where they belong
- Skip days of sync – jump to today's state
- Discord webhook notifications on complete or fail
SYSTEM OPTIMIZATION · NODE MONITORING · LIVE DIAGNOSTICS
- Tunes Linux kernel for node workloads
- Swappiness scaled by detected RAM size
- I/O scheduler: NVMe – none, SSD/HDD – mq-deadline
- CPU governor set to performance mode
- File descriptor limit – 65536 with systemd override
- v1.1 fix: systemd was silently resetting limit to 1024
- Backs up all original settings before any change
- Smart detection prevents duplicate backups on re-run
- Full reversal – reads from optimizer backup files
- Restores every setting exactly as it was
- Removes all BlockDAG files and folders system-wide
- Sudo keepalive pattern – no mid-run permission drops
- For operators needing a completely clean restart
- Commands to check every changed setting
- Expected values vs system defaults explained
- Queries JSON-RPC for block height twice with gap
- Converts hex block numbers from RPC response
- Computes time remaining to chain tip
- Auto-detects Docker Compose vs standalone containers
- Pulls full peer list from node RPC
- Used to diagnose slow sync in specific regions
- Checks required ports open and externally reachable
- Walks operator through router config if closed
DOCKER & PERMISSIONS · BACKUP & RECOVERY · INFRASTRUCTURE MAINTENANCE
- Installs from official apt repository only
- Sets up keyring and pins official source
- Adds current user to docker group
- Removes docker.io, docker-compose v1 legacy packages
- Run before official installer on existing machines
- Fixes need for sudo on every docker command
- Checks group membership and socket state
- Run before Fix-Permissions to understand the issue
- Targets 4 specific folders deep inside node root
- Configurable retention – set how many backups to keep
- Auto-deletes oldest when retention limit hit
- Error tracking – records failures without early exit
- Supports internal, external, and network storage
- Detects appropriate rsync flags per filesystem
- Rewritten multiple times after silent failures
- Preserves hidden files, symlinks, ACLs, permissions
- Built because cp -r silently drops critical files
DATABASE MAINTENANCE · WEB TOOLS · INVESTIGATION & TRACKING
- Hard crash can silently corrupt .sst files
- Node fails on startup with cryptic error – this finds why
- Scans all .sst files across all node volumes
- Identifies faulty files by size anomaly detection
- Copies corrupted files from node root
- Isolates them in separate folder away from root
07-web-tools/crypto_tracker.html · Single HTML file · No server · No install · localStorage only
- No server · no tracking · no leaks
